subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-06-17 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: When the Blessed Beauty was in Baghdad, Mirza Muhit, the famous Shaykhi, arrived in that city for the purpose of visiting Kazimayn.
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که جمال مبارک در بغداد بودند میرزا محیط مشهور شیخی آمد به دارالسلام
